use_codes.desc: USE TO INCREASE LINEAR GROWTH IN PEDIATRIC PATIENTS WITH ACHONDROPLASIA WHO ARE 5 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER WITH OPEN EPIPHYSES
USE TO INCREASE LINEAR GROWTH IN PEDIATRIC PATIENTS WITH ACHONDROPLASIA WITH OPEN EPIPHYSES

indications.text:
VOXZOGO is indicated to increase linear growth in pediatric patients with achondroplasia with open
epiphyses. This indication is approved under accelerated approval based on an improvement in annualized
growth velocity [see Clinical Studies (14)]. Continued approval for this indication may be contin...

growth velocity [see Clinical Studies (14)]. Continued approval for this indication may be contin...

VOXZOGO is indicated to increase linear growth in pediatric patients with achondroplasia who are 5
years of age and older with open epiphyses. This indication is approved under accelerated approval based
on an improvement in annualized growth velocity [see Clinical Studies (14)]. Continued approval ...
